query_normalized: predicting material properties from compositional data with graph neural networks materials science
rationale: This paper proposes a Deep Arbitrary Polynomial Chaos Neural Network architecture for general data-driven applications and stochastic analysis, which does not address Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) or the specific domain of materials science property prediction from compositional data.
